mapper.select: SELECT gl.id, gl.company_id, gl.account_code, gl.fiscal_year, gl.fiscal_month, gl.beginning_debit_balance, gl.beginning_credit_balance, gl.period_debit_amount, gl.period_credit_amount, gl.year_to_date_debit, gl.year_to_date_credit, gl.ending_debit_balance, gl.ending_credit_balance, gl.is_closed, gl.closed_at, gl.created_at, gl.updated_at FROM general_ledger gl WHERE gl.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND gl.account_code = #{accountCode} AND gl.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND gl.fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO general_ledger ( company_id, account_code, fiscal_year, fiscal_month, beginning_debit_balance, beginning_credit_balance, period_debit_amount, period_credit_amount, year_to_date_debit, year_to_date_credit, ending_debit_balance, ending_credit_balance, is_closed ) VALUES ( #{companyId}::uuid, #{accountCode}, #{fiscalYear}, #{fiscalMonth}, #{beginningDebitBalance}, #{beginningCreditBalance}, #{periodDebitAmount}, #{periodCreditAmount}, #{yearToDateDebit}, #{yearToDateCredit}, #{endingDebitBalance}, #{endingCreditBalance}, #{isClosed} ) ON CONFLICT (company_id, account_code, fiscal_year, fiscal_month) DO UPDATE SET period_debit_amount = general_ledger.period_debit_amount + EXCLUDED.period_debit_amount, period_credit_amount = general_ledger.period_credit_amount + EXCLUDED.period_credit_amount, year_to_date_debit = general_ledger.year_to_date_debit + EXCLUDED.period_debit_amount, year_to_date_credit = general_ledger.year_to_date_credit + EXCLUDED.period_credit_amount, ending_debit_balance = general_ledger.ending_debit_balance + EXCLUDED.period_debit_amount - EXCLUDED.period_credit_amount, ending_credit_balance = general_ledger.ending_credit_balance + EXCLUDED.period_credit_amount - EXCLUDED.period_debit_amount, is_closed = EXCLUDED.is_closed, closed_at = EXCLUDED.closed_at, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE general_ledger SET period_debit_amount = period_debit_amount + #{debitAmount}, period_credit_amount = period_credit_amount + #{creditAmount}, year_to_date_debit = year_to_date_debit + #{debitAmount}, year_to_date_credit = year_to_date_credit + #{creditAmount}, ending_debit_balance = ending_debit_balance + #{debitAmount} - #{creditAmount}, ending_credit_balance = ending_credit_balance + #{creditAmount} - #{debitAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{generalLedgerId}

UPDATE general_ledger SET period_debit_amount = 0, period_credit_amount = 0, year_to_date_debit = 0, year_to_date_credit = 0, ending_debit_balance = 0, ending_credit_balance = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND account_code = #{accountCode} AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth}

UPDATE general_ledger SET period_debit_amount = #{periodDebitAmount}, period_credit_amount = #{periodCreditAmount}, year_to_date_debit = #{yearToDateDebit}, year_to_date_credit = #{yearToDateCredit}, ending_debit_balance = #{endingDebitBalance}, ending_credit_balance = #{endingCreditBalance}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND account_code = #{accountCode} AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth}
mapper.select: SELECT gld.id, gld.general_ledger_id, gld.journal_entry_id, gld.posting_date, gld.debit_amount, gld.credit_amount, gld.running_balance, gld.description, gld.created_at FROM gl_details gld WHERE gld.general_ledger_id = #{generalLedgerId} ORDER BY gld.posting_date, gld.id

SELECT gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type, COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_debit_balance), 0) as debit_balance, COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_credit_balance), 0) as credit_balance FROM general_ledger gl INNER JOIN chart_of_accounts coa ON gl.account_code = coa.account_code WHERE gl.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND gl.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND gl.fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND coa.is_active = true GROUP BY gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type HAVING COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_debit_balance), 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_credit_balance), 0) > 0 ORDER BY coa.account_type, gl.account_code

SELECT gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type, CASE WHEN coa.account_type = '수익' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_credit_amount - gl.period_debit_amount), 0) WHEN coa.account_type = '비용' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_debit_amount - gl.period_credit_amount), 0) ELSE 0 END as amount FROM general_ledger gl INNER JOIN chart_of_accounts coa ON gl.account_code = coa.account_code WHERE gl.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND gl.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND gl.fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND coa.account_type IN ('수익', '비용') AND coa.is_active = true GROUP BY gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type HAVING (CASE WHEN coa.account_type = '수익' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_credit_amount - gl.period_debit_amount), 0) WHEN coa.account_type = '비용' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_debit_amount - gl.period_credit_amount), 0) ELSE 0 END) != 0 ORDER BY coa.account_type DESC, gl.account_code

SELECT gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type, CASE WHEN coa.account_type = '자산' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_debit_balance - gl.ending_credit_balance), 0) WHEN coa.account_type IN ('부채', '자본') THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_credit_balance - gl.ending_debit_balance), 0) ELSE 0 END as amount FROM general_ledger gl INNER JOIN chart_of_accounts coa ON gl.account_code = coa.account_code WHERE gl.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND gl.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND gl.fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND coa.account_type IN ('자산', '부채', '자본') AND coa.is_active = true GROUP BY gl.account_code, coa.account_name, coa.account_type HAVING (CASE WHEN coa.account_type = '자산' THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_debit_balance - gl.ending_credit_balance), 0) WHEN coa.account_type IN ('부채', '자본') THEN COALESCE(SUM(gl.ending_credit_balance - gl.ending_debit_balance), 0) ELSE 0 END) != 0 ORDER BY CASE coa.account_type WHEN '자산' THEN 1 WHEN '부채' THEN 2 WHEN '자본' THEN 3 END, gl.account_code

SELECT gl.account_code, coa.account_name, COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_debit_amount), 0) as period_debit, COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_credit_amount), 0) as period_credit, COALESCE(SUM(gl.period_debit_amount - gl.period_credit_amount), 0) as net_change FROM general_ledger gl INNER JOIN chart_of_accounts coa ON gl.account_code = coa.account_code WHERE gl.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND gl.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND gl.fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND (gl.account_code LIKE '%1000' OR gl.account_code LIKE '%1010' OR gl.account_code LIKE '%1100') -- 현금성 자산 AND coa.is_active = true GROUP BY gl.account_code, coa.account_name ORDER BY gl.account_code
mapper.update: UPDATE general_ledger SET is_closed = true, closed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND is_closed = false

UPDATE general_ledger SET is_closed = false, closed_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND is_closed = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO general_ledger ( company_id, account_code, fiscal_year, fiscal_month, beginning_debit_balance, beginning_credit_balance, period_debit_amount, period_credit_amount, year_to_date_debit, year_to_date_credit, ending_debit_balance, ending_credit_balance, is_closed ) SELECT company_id, account_code, CASE WHEN fiscal_month = 12 THEN fiscal_year + 1 ELSE fiscal_year END as fiscal_year, CASE WHEN fiscal_month = 12 THEN 1 ELSE fiscal_month + 1 END as fiscal_month, ending_debit_balance as beginning_debit_balance, ending_credit_balance as beginning_credit_balance, 0 as period_debit_amount, 0 as period_credit_amount, CASE WHEN fiscal_month = 12 THEN ending_debit_balance -- 연도말이면 YTD 리셋 ELSE year_to_date_debit END as year_to_date_debit, CASE WHEN fiscal_month = 12 THEN ending_credit_balance -- 연도말이면 YTD 리셋 ELSE year_to_date_credit END as year_to_date_credit, ending_debit_balance, ending_credit_balance, false as is_closed FROM general_ledger WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} AND fiscal_month = #{fiscalMonth} AND is_closed = true ON CONFLICT (company_id, account_code, fiscal_year, fiscal_month) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_month, COUNT(*) as total_accounts, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_closed THEN 1 END) as closed_accounts, MAX(closed_at) as closed_at FROM general_ledger WHERE company_id = #{companyId}::uuid GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_month HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_closed THEN 1 END) > 0 ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_month DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
